audit_items.proof_trace: BaseAuction._onAuctionEnd unconditionally reads IERC20(s_assetOut).balanceOf(address(this)) and safeTransfers the entire balance to s_assetOutReceiver (lines 393-396); this block is not gated on hasFeeAggregator. s_assetOut and s_assetOutReceiver cannot change during a live auction because both setters call _whenNoLiveAuctions(), and s_assetOut is never itself an auctioned asset (performUpkeep redirects it to a direct transfer at line 350), so the hasFeeAggregator branch can never drain assetOut to the fee aggregator instead.
